text.title: Methodologies Index Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Methodologies Index methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: slot-decide
step.action: Decide which group the methodology belongs to; create a new group if no existing fit (max 8).

step.name: insert-row
step.action: Insert <methodology> row alphabetically inside the group; ensure complexity + produces attrs present.

step.name: validate
step.decision-gate: If any violation, do not commit.
